name: Nacho Grande Corn Bread Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 13x9 inch pan with cornmeal.
2. Unroll the Cornbread Twists and press into the bottom and up the sides of the pan to form a crust. Press perforations to seal.
3. Bake for 14-19 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven.
4. Increase oven temperature to 400°F (200°C).
5. In a small bowl, mash the pinto beans with a fork. Stir in the reserved bean liquid and chili powder, mixing well.
6. Spread the mashed beans evenly over the baked crust.
7. Top with mushrooms, tomatoes, and jalapeno pepper slices.
8. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 5-10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
10. Cut into squares and serve with sour cream, green onions, and sliced olives.
